special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Handling Characteristics
special_mechanics.description: Each of four selectable cars has unique handling characteristics affecting cornering ability, top speed, and fuel consumption. Example: Cannibal emphasizes high speed with low tire grip and high fuel consumption; Sidewinder offers superior cornering with lower fuel usage.

special_mechanics.name: Nitro Boost
special_mechanics.description: Temporary speed burst mechanic. Limited to three boosts per race.

special_mechanics.name: Fuel Management
special_mechanics.description: Running out of fuel ends the race. Players may refuel during pit stops at time cost.

special_mechanics.name: Obstacle Collision
special_mechanics.description: Road obstacles cause significant slowdown upon collision.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and car handling characteristics but no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical movement values. Movement feel is determined by vehicle selection rather than player character physics.
